name: Task Orchestration & Lifecycle
description: Manages the full lifecycle of AI agent tasks including creation, queuing, dependency resolution, file lock coordination, pause/unpause, and cancellation. Ensures tasks run safely without conflicting file access.

Managers/FileLockManager.cs.content:
class FileLockManager
  LockCount: int
  ReleaseTaskLocks(string taskId) -> void
  IsFileLocked(string normalizedPath) -> bool
  GetTaskLockedFiles(string taskId) -> HashSet<string>
  CheckQueuedTasks(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks) -> void
  ForceStartQueuedTask(AgentTask task) -> void
  AddQueuedTaskInfo(string taskId, QueuedTaskInfo info) -> void
  RemoveQueuedInfo(string taskId) -> void
  ClearAll() -> void
  SetGitOperationInProgress(bool inProgress) -> void
  TryExtractFilePathFromPartial(string partialJson) -> string?
  ExtractFilePath(JsonElement input) -> string?

Managers/TaskExecutionManager.cs.content:
class TaskExecutionManager
  LaunchHeadless(AgentTask task) -> void
  CancelTaskImmediate(AgentTask task) -> void
  KillProcess(AgentTask task) -> void
  RemoveStreamingState(string taskId) -> void
  PauseTask(AgentTask task) -> void
  SpawnSubtask(AgentTask parent, string description, bool inheritSettings = true) -> AgentTask
  SpawnSubtaskAndQueue(AgentTask parent, string description) -> AgentTask
  ExtractAndSpawnSubtasks(AgentTask parent, string output) -> List<AgentTask>?
  InjectSubtaskResult(AgentTask parent, AgentTask child) -> void
  ExtractAndSpawnTeam(AgentTask parent, string output) -> List<AgentTask>?
  Description: string
  DependsOn: List<int>?
  Role: string
  Description: string
  DependsOn: List<int>?

Managers/TaskOrchestrator.cs.content:
class TaskOrchestrator
  AddTask(AgentTask task, List<string> dependsOn) -> void
  GetNextRunnableTasks(int maxCount) -> List<AgentTask>
  OnTaskCompleted(string taskId) -> void
  DetectCycle(string fromId, string toId) -> bool
  ReevaluateAll() -> void
  RemoveTask(string taskId) -> void
  ContainsTask(string taskId) -> bool
  MarkResolved(string taskId) -> void
  Id: string
  Task: AgentTask?
  IsResolved: bool
  UnresolvedDependencies: HashSet<string>
  Dependents: HashSet<string>

Managers/TaskProcessLauncher.cs.content:
class TaskProcessLauncher
  ProcessQueuedMessagesCallback: Action<AgentTask, ObservableCollection<AgentTask>, ObservableCollection<AgentTask>>?
  StartManagedProcess(AgentTask task, Process process) -> void
  KillProcess(AgentTask task) -> void
  RemoveStreamingState(string taskId) -> void
  CleanupScripts(string taskId) -> void
  PauseTask(AgentTask task) -> void

patterns: File lock guard before Git operations
dependencies: Calls Claude CLI via Process through PromptBuilder
